summary.para: Calculates a date range from day-based parameters.

The Get-DateRange cmdlet calculates date ranges from simple integer day parameters (olderThan/youngerThan), enabling users to define archival windows without dealing with complex date objects. Returns DateRangeResult objects compatible with PowerShell pipeline chaining.
Number of days in the past for the start of the range (oldest date).
Number of days in the past for the end of the range (newest date). Default is 0 (today).
The date criteria type: CreationDate or ModifiedDate. Default is ModifiedDate.

member.name: T:logManager.Models.DateCriteriaType
member.summary: Specifies which file date property to use for filtering.

member.name: F:logManager.Models.DateCriteriaType.CreationDate
member.summary: Use the file or folder creation date.

member.name: F:logManager.Models.DateCriteriaType.ModifiedDate
member.summary: Use the file or folder last modified date.

member.name: T:logManager.Models.DateRangeResult
member.summary: Represents a single date in a calculated date range. Returned by Get-DateRange cmdlet and used throughout the pipeline.

member.name: P:logManager.Models.DateRangeResult.Criteria
member.summary: The date criteria type (CreationDate or ModifiedDate) associated with this range.

member.name: T:logManager.Services.DateRangeCalculator
member.summary: Service for calculating date ranges based on day-based parameters. Foundation layer - no dependencies on other services.

member.name: M:logManager.Services.DateRangeCalculator.Calculate(System.Int32,System.Int32,logManager.Models.DateCriteriaType)
member.summary: Calculates a date range from today going backwards based on olderThan and youngerThan parameters.
member.param: Number of days in the past for the start of the range (oldest date).
Number of days in the past for the end of the range (newest date). Default is 0 (today).
The date criteria type to associate with the results.
member.returns: Array of DateRangeResult objects representing each day in the range (inclusive).
member.exception: Thrown when olderThan is less than youngerThan.
